title: repo maintenance: gc cleanup and pre-release git audit
desc: Pre-release git audit workflow: check tracked files, scrub secrets, use wkappbot gc to clean objects.
steps: Run wkappbot gc --sweep to remove orphaned git objects after history rewrites or large file removals.
Check git-tracked hq and runtime files: git ls-files
runtime' should return empty (these dirs are gitignored).
Verify no secrets committed: git log --all --oneline --diff-filter=A -- '*.env' '*.key' '*secret*' should return empty.
author: claude
